ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan account */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type (e.g., mortgage, personal, auto) */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Initial principal amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest rate for the loan */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan (e.g., number of months or years) */,
  "payment_schedule" TEXT /* Payment schedule (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., active, paid off, defaulted) */,
  "disbursal_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was disbursed */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next expected payment */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Number of late payments made */,
  "late_fee_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of late fees charged */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Brief description of the purpose of the loan */,
  "co_borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-borrower, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_interest_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("interest_rate_id") REFERENCES interest_rates ("interest_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "minimum_term" INTEGER /* Minimum term for the loan type */,
  "maximum_term" INTEGER /* Maximum term for the loan type */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" TEXT /* Minimum loan amount for the loan type */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" TEXT /* Maximum loan amount for the loan type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "interest_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate for the loan type */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_schedules" (
  "payment_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment schedule */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "due_amount" TEXT /* Amount due for the payment */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the payment has been made (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_schedules_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "interest_paid" TEXT /* Interest paid in the payment */,
  "principal_paid" TEXT /* Principal paid in the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or code for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Balance of the loan after the payment */,
  "interest_balance" TEXT /* Balance of interest due */,
  "principal_balance" TEXT /* Balance of the principal amount due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balances_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., payment history, balance summary) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the report is archived (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
